name: zillow-mcp
description: Zillow real-estate access for Claude — search listings, fetch property details, Zestimate history, saved searches & homes, market reports

tools.name: zillow_search_properties
tools.description: Search Zillow listings by location and optional filters (status, price, beds/baths, home type)

tools.name: zillow_get_property
tools.description: Fetch a property's full details (price, Zestimate, beds, schools, price history) by zpid or homedetails URL

tools.name: zillow_get_zestimate_history
tools.description: Historical Zestimate time series for a property by zpid or URL

tools.name: zillow_get_saved_searches
tools.description: The signed-in user's saved searches with new-listing counts

tools.name: zillow_get_market_report
tools.description: Market report for a region — median sale/list/rent prices, days on market, ZHVI

tools.name: zillow_calculate_mortgage
tools.description: Local PITI mortgage-payment calculator — no network
